ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-27-2008 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE AND MAINTAINING CURRENT TRIAL DATE, AND EXTENDING DISCOVERY CUTOFF IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A). THE CASE REMAINS IN BRAYTON GROUP 410 WITH TRIAL DATE MAINTAINED ON 4/14/08 AT 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206. PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE OF MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE AFTER CONTACTING DEPT. 220. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT WAS STIPULATED TO. ALL ECONOMIC EXPERT DISCOVERY IS TO BE COMPLETED 14 CALENDAR DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, INCLUDING DEPOSITION OF ECONOMIC EXPERT. THE PARED-DOWN LIST OF EXPERTS WILL BE FAXED NO LATER THAN 14 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL DATE. NO LATER THAN 12 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, EACH SIDE MAY IDENTIFY UP TO THREE EXPERT WITNESSES PERCEIVED TO BE NECESSARY TO BE DEPOSED FOR MEANINGFUL SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS TO OCCUR. THESE EXPERTS WILL BE DEPOSED PRIOR TO THE TRIAL DATE. TRIAL WILL NOT BE DELAYED FOR THE PURPOSE OF DEPOSING EXPERTS. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: DLOK; REPORTER: LETICIA PEREZ, CSR #7782 (206)
